name: [ - Eeveelutions - ]
description: The Eeveelutions are a popular group of nine Pokémon consisting of Eevee and its eight other evolutions, Vaporeon, a water-type, Jolteon, an electric-type, Flareon, a fire-type, Espeon, a psychic-type, Umbreon, a dark-type, Leafeon, a grass-type, Glaceon, a ice-type, and Sylveon, a fairy-type. Eevee itself is a normal-type Pokémon.
creator: _eeveelutionlover_
